name: cheerer
description: Plays context-aware encouragement, pixel animations, and multilingual voice feedback when Claude Code finishes a task.

lang.title: Voice language
lang.description: Voice language for encouragement messages (zh / en / ja / ko / es, default: zh)

voice.title: Voice output
voice.description: Enable voice output (on / off / true / false, default: on)

style.title: Celebration style
style.description: Celebration style (adaptive / balanced / hype / cozy, default: adaptive)

intensity.title: Celebration intensity
intensity.description: Celebration intensity (soft / normal / high, default: normal)
